title: Nether Brick Fence Gate
description: Adds Nether Brick fence gates, because for some reason they don't exist in vanilla.
body: # Nether Brick Fence Gate **Adds Nether brick fence gates**, something that should be in minecraft but unfortunately isn't for some mysterious reason. That's all it does. It's a very simple mod, I don't need to explain more. Not gonna lag your game or anything. ![The recipe, 4 nether bricks and 2 nether brick blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/24a697893d2dc3e9d3978ee9011dc079715d1a29.png) ![A scene with the fence gate in use](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/69bf9a3a157589a415df8a38c434cbef19e2e42a_0.webp)
